list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Initial commit: NetPelis - Spring Boot + MySQL + Security
# Conflicts: # .idea/workspace.xml # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/AdminDashboardController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/AdminFavoritoController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/ClienteDashboardController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/PeliculaController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/repository/RepositorioResena.java # src/main/resources/templates/admin/Peliculas.html # src/main/resources/templates/admin/favoritos.html # src/main/resources/templates/admin/usuarios.html

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Initial commit: NetPelis - Spring Boot + MySQL + Security
# Conflicts: # .idea/workspace.xml # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/AdminDashboardController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/AdminFavoritoController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/ClienteDashboardController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/controller/PeliculaController.java # src/main/java/com/NetPelis/netPelis/repository/RepositorioResena.java # src/main/resources/templates/admin/Peliculas.html # src/main/resources/templates/admin/favoritos.html # src/main/resources/templates/admin/usuarios.html
